geographic_restrictions: Vermont, North Carolina, Virginia, and New York City
project_area: Food Access & Hunger, Environmental Justice & Advocacy, Agricultural Education
demographic_requirements: Supports small grassroots organizations focused on social and environmental justice, prioritizing equitable solutions and sustainable community development.
eligibility_summary: Non-profit, tax-exempt organizations in Vermont, North Carolina, Virginia, and New York City are eligible. Excludes funding for lobbying, land acquisition, and scholarships.
